positive: A highly stylized, abstract forest creature silhouette, resembling a celestial fox or mystical canine. It is posed majestically, leaping over winding roots and luminous glowing flora. The creature should have large, ethereal ears and flowing, wispy tails, rendered in complementary tones of deep indigo, cosmic purple, and iridescent silver. The background is a stylized depiction of an otherworldly, bioluminescent forest canopy, featuring geometric patterns and glowing energy veins. Style: Neo-art nouveau mixed with modern tattoo flash aesthetics. Composition: Central, dramatic, high contrast silhouette against a vibrant, saturated glow. Lighting: Dramatic rim lighting emphasizing the creature's outline. Print-friendly details: Vector quality, suitable for screen printing on dark apparel.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, poorly drawn, copyright, trademark, messy lines, jpeg artifacts
